subcodes.first_line: O Son of the Noble One! Hearken unto the call of thy Lord, the All-Glorious, from the Noble Valley: "Verily, there is none other God but Me." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابن النبیل ان استمع ندآء ربک الجلیل من واد النبیل انه لا اله الا انا
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
